records.heading: Observe RHP-016.1 sealed commit/current HEAD
records.why: RHP-016.2 starts from the already-published RHP-016.1 seal.

records.heading: Create remote CI wound packet
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.ci_wound_packet --wound-class browser_supervisor_websockets_dependency_api_drift --subject-commit 1b61c682805e7083e5c410af705898ed4a373102 --workflow Tests --run-url https://github.com/jacksonjp0311-gif/hermes-agent-evo/actions/runs/27355410501 --failed-test-file tests/tools/test_browser_supervisor.py --repro-command python -m pytest tests/tools/test_browser_supervisor.py --source github-actions-verified --root-cause Remote CI failure: websockets.asyncio.client expects websockets.proxy and uri.Proxy, but the installed websockets package surface does not provide them. --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-016-2-ci-wound-browser-supervisor-websockets\ci-wound-packet.json
records.why: Packetize failing workflow/test/root cause with authority and execution disabled.

records.heading: Create non-executing repair proposal
records.why: Carry allowed paths, test commands, repair options, risk, and rollback without execution authority.

records.heading: Compile RHP-016.2 wound/proposal surfaces
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m py_compile rhp/ci_wound_packet.py rhp/browser_supervisor_websockets_proposal.py rhp/wound_taxonomy.py tests/test_rhp_016_2_ci_wound_packet.py tests/test_rhp_016_2_browser_supervisor_websockets_proposal.py
records.why: Catch syntax/import issues before focused tests.

records.heading: Run CI wound/proposal focused tests
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m pytest -q -o addopts= tests/test_rhp_016_2_ci_wound_packet.py tests/test_rhp_016_2_browser_supervisor_websockets_proposal.py tests/test_rhp_015_8_wound_taxonomy.py tests/test_rhp_015_8_proposal_packet.py
records.why: Prove wound packet and proposal-only repair scaffold before push.
